scope: Initial Kernel-local resolver contract registry placeholder. It records resolver contract policy and intentionally contains no active resolver MVP rules.

unknown_decision_family_policy.note: Future resolver execution must halt/fail closed for unknown decision_family_id rather than inventing an option.

official_docs_policy: Official docs may support documented platform/editor capability only; they do not prove target-project availability, active Pro license, current user permission, constructability, Builder execution, runtime behavior, downstream acceptance, or production readiness.
next_allowed_step: KROAD-006 may implement a small resolver MVP after this contract baseline is merged and validated.
